title: Mini Apps
subtitle: Instantly generated mini apps, ready to use right away. You can also continue to iterate on them.

empty.generate: Generate as you chat, ready instantly. Start a conversation with AI to create your first mini app.

selectFolderTitle: Select mini app directory (must contain meta.json and source/)

confirmDelete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
confirmDelete.message: This action cannot be undone. The app and all its data will be permanently deleted.

customize.title: Customize MiniApp
customize.riskTitle: Changes are previewed before they replace the app
customize.riskBody: The active app is unchanged until Apply. The current version is saved before replacement, and new permissions require a separate confirmation.
customize.requestPlaceholder: Example: make the interface lighter, or improve interaction feedback and layout details
customize.workspaceRequired: A workspace is required to launch the MiniApp editor.
customize.builtinUpdateBody: This app has local changes. Updating to the bundled version can overwrite those edits, so keep the local copy until you explicitly choose to update.
customize.dismissBuiltinUpdate: Do not remind for this version
customize.launchFailed: Preview copy is ready, but the editor failed to start: {{error}}
customize.applySaved: Applied. Previous version saved; use MiniApp versions to roll back.

permissionDialog.title: New permissions need confirmation
permissionDialog.body: This change adds or expands permissions. Review the changes before applying them to the active app.
